texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: MEETINGS AND CONFERENCING
texts.text: MEETINGS AND CONFERENCING

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Day conferences will be charged at Ksh. 3,800 per person
texts.text: Day conferences will be charged at Ksh. 3,800 per person

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Day conference including access to water slides and zip lines at Ksh 5,500 per person
texts.text: Day conference including access to water slides and zip lines at Ksh 5,500 per person

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Flip chart & Marker pens provided.
texts.text: Flip chart & Marker pens provided.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Notepad & pens provided.
texts.text: Notepad & pens provided.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Projector provided.
texts.text: Projector provided.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · 500 ml bottle of water provided for the morning and afternoon sessions provided.
texts.text: 500 ml bottle of water provided for the morning and afternoon sessions provided.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Mints provided.
texts.text: Mints provided.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CHILDREN ACCOMODATION TARRIFF ARE SUBJECT TO:
texts.text: CHILDREN ACCOMODATION TARRIFF ARE SUBJECT TO:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: o Children 2 years and below are free of charge (while sharing with adults)
texts.text: o Children 2 years and below are free of charge (while sharing with adults)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: o A child 9 years and below sharing with 2 adults pays 50% .
texts.text: o A child 9 years and below sharing with 2 adults pays 50% .

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: o A child sharing with 1 adult in a room pays 100% of adult rate.
texts.text: o A child sharing with 1 adult in a room pays 100% of adult rate.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: o Children 10 years and above are considered as adults
texts.text: o Children 10 years and above are considered as adults

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: o Children having exclusive use of the room pay 100% of the adult rate
texts.text: o Children having exclusive use of the room pay 100% of the adult rate

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: EASTER & CHRISTMAS SUPPLEMENT:
texts.text: EASTER & CHRISTMAS SUPPLEMENT:

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: A supplement will be levied over:-
texts.text: A supplement will be levied over:-

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Easter weekend, Friday Saturday and Sunday
texts.text: Easter weekend, Friday Saturday and Sunday

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Christmas and new year 24 th 25 th, 26 th and 31 st December and 1 st Jan
texts.text: Christmas and new year 24 th 25 th, 26 th and 31 st December and 1 st Jan

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The rate for resident adults and children will be Ksh. 3,000 and Ksh 2,000 per person per night respectively.
texts.text: The rate for resident adults and children will be Ksh. 3,000 and Ksh 2,000 per person per night respectively.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Non-resident rate will be USD 40 and USD 30 for adults and children respectively, per person per night.
texts.text: Non-resident rate will be USD 40 and USD 30 for adults and children respectively, per person per night.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: ROOM BOOKING AND RELEASE PERIOD
texts.text: ROOM BOOKING AND RELEASE PERIOD

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All block bookings are to be confirmed by the agent a minimum of 30 days prior to arrival at the lodge. Rooming lists must be submitted to the lodge's reservations department a minimum of 10 days prior to arrival. Bookings made and not paid for will be released at the discretion of the lodge, without notice to the agent if payment is not received 30 days in advance of the booking.
texts.text: All block bookings are to be confirmed by the agent a minimum of 30 days prior to arrival at the lodge. Rooming lists must be submitted to the lodge's reservations department a minimum of 10 days prior to arrival. Bookings made and not paid for will be released at the discretion of the lodge, without notice to the agent if payment is not received 30 days in advance of the booking.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CANCELLATION POLICY
texts.text: CANCELLATION POLICY

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1. For bookings canceled or amended between 10 days from the expected date of arrival, 25% of the applicable rate per bed night will be charged.
texts.text: For bookings canceled or amended between 10 days from the expected date of arrival, 25% of the applicable rate per bed night will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 2. For bookings canceled or amended between 9 and 48 hours before the date of arrival, 50% of the applicable rate per bed night will be charged.
texts.text: For bookings canceled or amended between 9 and 48 hours before the date of arrival, 50% of the applicable rate per bed night will be charged.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 3. In case of cancellation or amendment within 48 hours from the date of arrival 75% of the value of booking will be charged
texts.text: In case of cancellation or amendment within 48 hours from the date of arrival 75% of the value of booking will be charged

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 4. In case of cancellation or amendment in less than 48 hours from the expected date of arrival or in case of 'NO SHOW' will attract a 100% cancellation.
texts.text: In case of cancellation or amendment in less than 48 hours from the expected date of arrival or in case of 'NO SHOW' will attract a 100% cancellation.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: PAYMENT POLICY
texts.text: PAYMENT POLICY

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: a. A 50% deposit is payable on confirmation of booking and the balance 15 days prior to the arrival of the clients. Bookings not secured by the appropriate deposit will be released automatically and without prior notification.
texts.text: A 50% deposit is payable on confirmation of booking and the balance 15 days prior to the arrival of the clients. Bookings not secured by the appropriate deposit will be released automatically and without prior notification.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: b. All payments made by cheque must be cleared prior to the arrival of the clients. In the event a cheque is returned by the bank as "unpaid" for any reason the agent shall replace the payment by cash and additionally agrees to pay the returned cheque fee thereof.
texts.text: All payments made by cheque must be cleared prior to the arrival of the clients. In the event a cheque is returned by the bank as "unpaid" for any reason the agent shall replace the payment by cash and additionally agrees to pay the returned cheque fee thereof.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: c. The agent agrees to pay any and all costs, including legal fees, court costs and any other expenses incurred by Sirville Lake Elementaita Lodge in the collection of unpaid invoices, returned cheque or default payment.
texts.text: The agent agrees to pay any and all costs, including legal fees, court costs and any other expenses incurred by Sirville Lake Elementaita Lodge in the collection of unpaid invoices, returned cheque or default payment.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: d. Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Sirville Lake Elementaita Lodge accounts department within 4 days of invoicing and only amount in dispute may be deducted from the invoice and Payment due, which must be made within the specific time limit.
texts.text: Any dispute regarding an invoice must be received by Sirville Lake Elementaita Lodge accounts department within 4 days of invoicing and only amount in dispute may be deducted from the invoice and Payment due, which must be made within the specific time limit.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: e. Default of undisputed payment may result in Agent's clients being refused admission to the lodge until payment is made. Consistent default will result in cancellation of this agreement.
texts.text: Default of undisputed payment may result in Agent's clients being refused admission to the lodge until payment is made. Consistent default will result in cancellation of this agreement.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: VARIATION
texts.text: VARIATION

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The contractual rates mentioned in this contract are subject to change without any notice in the event of an increase in local taxes and government levies. However, every effort will be made to maintain them within the contractual period.
texts.text: The contractual rates mentioned in this contract are subject to change without any notice in the event of an increase in local taxes and government levies. However, every effort will be made to maintain them within the contractual period.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: RULES AND CONDUCT FOR ACTIVITIES
texts.text: RULES AND CONDUCT FOR ACTIVITIES

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The following general rules apply in all areas at Sirville Lake Elementaita Lodge
texts.text: The following general rules apply in all areas at Sirville Lake Elementaita Lodge

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Food and beverages from outside the premises are not allowed at all.
texts.text: Food and beverages from outside the premises are not allowed at all.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Sirville Water Park guests must sign the disclaimer form. Sirville Lake Elementaita LTD disclaims all liability and shall not be held liable in any manner for any trips, slips, fall including loss or damage of your property.
texts.text: Sirville Water Park guests must sign the disclaimer form. Sirville Lake Elementaita LTD disclaims all liability and shall not be held liable in any manner for any trips, slips, fall including loss or damage of your property.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Read and follow all the safety signs and follow instructions of staff at all times . Failure of refusal to follow instructions by staff will lead to removal of the said guest or guests from the activity area at the guests own cost.
texts.text: Read and follow all the safety signs and follow instructions of staff at all times . Failure of refusal to follow instructions by staff will lead to removal of the said guest or guests from the activity area at the guests own cost.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The Management reserves the right of admission. Unruly behavior and conduct will not be tolerated.
texts.text: The Management reserves the right of admission. Unruly behavior and conduct will not be tolerated.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Only persons participating in various activities and guardians will be tagged and allowed to enter activity area of the park.
texts.text: Only persons participating in various activities and guardians will be tagged and allowed to enter activity area of the park.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Persons under the influence of any drug or alcohol are not allowed to participate in any of our activities. Operator are under strict instruction not to allow persons they suspect to be under the influence.
texts.text: Persons under the influence of any drug or alcohol are not allowed to participate in any of our activities. Operator are under strict instruction not to allow persons they suspect to be under the influence.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: TRAVEL AGENTS COMMISSION
texts.text: TRAVEL AGENTS COMMISSION

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We propose to provide a performance based commission to reward travel agents in line with their dedication to secure clients for us. The salient features of the performance based contract are elaborated below:-
texts.text: We propose to provide a performance based commission to reward travel agents in line with their dedication to secure clients for us. The salient features of the performance based contract are elaborated below:-

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: I. If  in  a  month, an agents books less than 11 double rooms his/her commission will be 10%, or if the agent brings less 3 day groups each comprising of more than 15 people the said agent shall earn a 10% commission.
texts.text: If  in  a  month, an agents books less than 11 double rooms his/her commission will be 10%, or if the agent brings less 3 day groups each comprising of more than 15 people the said agent shall earn a 10% commission.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: An agent shall be paid 10% commission on the third day after the client has settled the bill.
texts.text: An agent shall be paid 10% commission on the third day after the client has settled the bill.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ⚫ It is the agents responsibility to ensure their performance is updated with every check-in by Sirville front desk.
texts.text: ⚫ It is the agents responsibility to ensure their performance is updated with every check-in by Sirville front desk.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ⚫ The agents commission shall be paid no later than 3 days after the clients has fully cleared the bill.
texts.text: ⚫ The agents commission shall be paid no later than 3 days after the clients has fully cleared the bill.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ⚫ If the agent is not registered for VAT and the clients pays directly to Sirville lodge - Sirville will automatically deduct VAT and catering levy at the prescribed rates.
texts.text: ⚫ If the agent is not registered for VAT and the clients pays directly to Sirville lodge - Sirville will automatically deduct VAT and catering levy at the prescribed rates.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ⚫ The driver and the travel agents team leader will be provided food and beverages served to the group.
texts.text: ⚫ The driver and the travel agents team leader will be provided food and beverages served to the group.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CONFIDENTIALITY
texts.text: CONFIDENTIALITY

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The agent confirms and agrees that the contents of this agreement are strictly confidential and that no part of this agreement in any form may be divulged to a third party.
texts.text: The agent confirms and agrees that the contents of this agreement are strictly confidential and that no part of this agreement in any form may be divulged to a third party.
